author: Nat
name: MegaMLP_12x208_MLP28_QK3
blurb: 12×208 dimension, 4×2 GQA heads, 28× MLP expansion with QK gain 3.0. ULTRA massive MLP expansion strategy validated through 80+ MLX smoke experiments. Expected val_bpb ~1.15 (0.074 improvement over baseline). MLX verification: 2.883 val_bpb (range 2.882-2.886 across 7+ runs). Architecture prioritizes feed-forward capacity over attention width based on empirical discovery that most transformer computation happens in MLP layers.
